articles.title: The AirPods Pro 3 are nearly matching their best-ever price for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
articles.description: Earlier this month, Apple announced the AirPods Max 2, a pair of over-ear headphones that leverage the company’s H2 chip for AI-powered live translation, conversation awareness, and a host of newer features. However, if you’re okay with a pair of earbuds, the AirPods Pro 3 offer access to all the same features for less — […]
articles.author: Sheena VasaniBrandon Widder

articles.title: Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale
articles.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale may not have been as “big” as Black Friday or even Prime Day, but depending on what you’re after, the discounts are more appealing than you might think. Take charging accessories, for instance. Anker, Twelve South, Baseus, and others have sharply lowered the prices of some of our favorite add-ons, including […]
articles.author: Brandon Widder

articles.title: Claude Code leak exposes a Tamagotchi-style ‘pet’ and an always-on agent
articles.description: After Anthropic released Claude Code's 2.1.88 update, users quickly discovered that it contained a package with a source map file containing its TypeScript codebase, with one person on X calling attention to the leak and posting a file containing the code. The leaked data reportedly contains more than 512,000 lines of code and provides a […]
articles.author: Emma Roth

articles.title: You can grab a four-pack of Govee’s color-changing smart bulbs for just $27
articles.description: Spring cleaning isn’t just about clearing things out. It’s also a chance to refresh your living space, and a simple place to start is smart lighting — specifically, Govee's Smart A19 LED Light Bulbs. The color-changing bulbs can instantly change the vibe of your home, and now through the end of today, March 31st, you […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: You can now use ChatGPT with Apple’s CarPlay
articles.description: ChatGPT is now accessible from your CarPlay dashboard if you have iOS 26.4 or newer and the latest version of the ChatGPT app, 9to5Mac reports. Apple's recently launched iOS 26.4 update added support for "voice-based conversational apps" in CarPlay, opening the door to let you use AI chatbots with voice features through Apple's in-car platform. […]
articles.author: Jay Peters

articles.title: Samsung’s new app claims to alleviate motion sickness using sound
articles.description: Samsung released a new free app today called Hearapy, now available for Android devices through the Google Play store, that it claims can reduce the symptoms of motion sickness using just sound. The app's functionality is very straightforward. It plays a low 100Hz sine wave tone through a pair of connected headphones for 60 seconds. […]
articles.author: Andrew Liszewski

articles.title: Anker's power bank with built-in cables is one of my favorite gadgets, and it's cheaper than usual
articles.description: Anker’s Laptop Power Bank is one of the more useful gadgets I’ve bought in recent years. I know, it’s just a portable battery, but it’s packed with power and thoughtful features that are tough to find in other models. And right now, you can buy it for $95.99 ($24 off) — the best price of […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is beautiful but a little too busy
articles.description: With The Super Mario Bros. Movie, Nintendo entered the next phase of its plan to become a different kind of entertainment giant. Though it wasn't the company's first go at putting its iconic plumbers on the big screen, the film demonstrated that Nintendo could collaborate with partners like Illumination to produce box office hits. The […]
articles.author: Charles Pulliam-Moore

articles.title: 150 million users later, Roblox competitor Rec Room is shutting down
articles.description: Rec Room, a Roblox-like social gaming platform that lets users create games and experiences for others to play, is shutting down on June 1st. Despite reaching more than 150 million players and creators and, at one point, being valued at $3.5 billion, the company says in a blog post that "we never quite figured out […]
articles.author: Jay Peters
